titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of History records14-17-1573
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-22 18:03:27 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of History records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, memoranda, catalogs, inventories, reports, minutes, and financial records.
did.abstract: History department correspondence, memoranda, catalogs, inventories, reports, and minutes; financial records including payrolls, accounts, budgets, invoices, and vouchers; student records; teaching applications and faculty appointments; department chairman's records of L. Pearce Williams, Paul W. Gates, and others; personnel files; items regarding the Messenger Lecture Series; and related materials.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: History department correspondence, memoranda, catalogs, inventories, reports, and minutes; financial records including payrolls, accounts, budgets, invoices, and vouchers; materials pertaining to the department's move from Boardman to West Sibley Hall, and later to McGraw Hall; student records including correspondence, gradebooks, course evaluations, draft deferment requests, applications, and other materials pertaining to study abroad, curriculum, fellowships, scholarships, assistantships, the Admissions Advisory Committee, advanced placement, honors program, prizes, quotas, and graduate study; Summer Session; teaching applications and faculty appointments; department chairman's records of L. Pearce Williams, Paul W. Gates, and others; personnel files; items regarding the Messenger Lecture Series; and related materials.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Department of History records, #14-17-1573. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Teaching applications and appointments, American Intellectual and Social History
Department records pertaining to Professors Finley, Rice and Simon.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted to permission of the Chairman of the Department.

did.unittitle: Inquiries for Graduate Assistants from other Educational Institutions
Accounts, Analysis Statement: Duniway Book Prize
Accounts, Analysis Statement: Macy Foundation Fellowship
Correspondence: President, Provost, Dean, Vice President
Correspondence: Deans of Colleges, Graduate Schools
Evaluation, Middle States Association of Colleges and Secondary Schools. Vol. I Cornell University
Evaluation, Middle States Association of Colleges and Secondary Schools. Vol. III College of Arts and Sciences
Job Lists and Proposed Graduate Teaching Program
Accounts 348 & 349, Invoices, vouchers, receipts, payrolls, mss. notes, typescript letter
Accounts 348 & 349, Receipts, vouchers, invoices, payroll, mss. notes
Account 349, list of expenses, receipts, payrolls
Accounts 348 & 349, Receipts, vouchers, invoices, payroll, lists of expenses
Accounts 348 & 349, Accounts, vouchers, receipts, invoices, payroll authorization, payrolls, mss. notes, lists of expenses
Admissions Advisory Committee: Typed letters, application forms, statistics, newspaper article, photocopied letters
Annual Reports of Department members to the chairman: Reports, memos, mss. letters, mss. Notes, annual reports, typed letters
Arts College, Curriculum revision: Programs, lists of proposed new courses, typed letters, curriculum proposals, mss. Letters, mss. Notes, admissions report
Advanced Placement: Mss. Notes, typed letters, listings
Advisees: Advisers note book, listings, typed letters, memos
Advisers, Undergraduate: Schedule, listings, typed letters, memos, mss. Notes
Assistants: typed letters, appointment forms, telegram, mss. Letters, memos, statements, mss. Notes
Appointment in Pre-modern Chinese History: typed letters, mss. Notes, mss. Letters, photocopied letters
Comparative studies, Society & History, University of Chicago: Correspondence
Dean of Colleges & Graduate School: Correspondence
Drescher (monographs): photocopied essay, paper, pamphlet, photocopied articles, typed letter
Departmental committees and representatives: listing, correspondence
Enrollment Information, Other Universities: Correspondence, photocopied list of courses
Europe 1648-1815: Correspondence, photocopied resumes, mss. Letters
National Defense Fellowship: Programs, memos, typed letters
German History Appointment: Mss. Notes, typed letters, telegram, mss. Letters
History Department Planning: Correspondence, mss. Listings
Introductory courses: Memos, typed letters, schedules
Renaissance and Reformation: typed letters, mss. Letters, telegram, photocopied letters
School of Education, Dean of Agriculture Engineering: Correspondence
Temporary Replacements: Mss. Letter, mss. Notes, typed letters
Undergrad Courses taken abroad: Mss. Letters, mss. Notes typed letters
Building File: move from Boardman Hall to W. Sibley Hall; move from W. Sibley to McGraw Hall
Posters for the LaFeber-Silbey Endowment lectures
Series III. Reports, Minutes, and memoranda
Series IV. Correspondence and Memoranda of L. Pearce Williams, History Department Chairman
